hero.title:
Join 
Octara
hero.description: We are building the future of open source technology. Octara is a community-driven initiative powered by passion and collective innovation.

mission.title: Shape the future of technology
mission.description: Octara is currently a self-funded, community-centered project. We are looking for people who believe in free access to technology and want to bring their skills to a growing ecosystem.
mission.volunteer: All positions currently listed are voluntary and unpaid. We are building the foundation together with a long-term vision of sustainability for everyone.
mission.future: If Octara ever becomes a true economic entity, everyone who contributed to Octara's development—regardless of role—will be offered a reward, such as access to additional services provided for free compared to others.

why.title: Why join us?
why.list1: Contribute to high-impact open source tools.
why.list2: Strengthen your portfolio with real projects.

role1.title: Community Manager
role1.description: Lead our digital presence and foster engagement across our platforms. You will be Octara's voice, connecting developers and users.

role2.title: Open contributor roles
role2.description: Help us build Octara’s core infrastructure. Whether you’re a developer, designer, or technical writer, we have projects that need your skills.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.description: Join our Discord to find the mission that matches you.
